content:
2 min read
Just now

--

The process:
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by charlesdeluvio on Unsplash1️⃣ Online Assessment 2️⃣ Recruiter call
3️⃣ Interview loop scheduled 4️⃣ DSA round
5️⃣ LLD round 6️⃣ HLD round
7️⃣ AA round
💻 The interviews:
1️⃣ OA round:
2 medium problems on HackerRank; 60 mins timer.
- Given n and k, find n unique integers that sum up to k.
- Given an array required_sums, count non-decreasing arrays result such that the digit sum of result[i] equals required_sums[i] for all elements.
- Solved both. But too close to 60 mins this time.
All 15 visible test cases passed.
2️⃣ DSA round:
- Brief intro + discussion about my current project.
- Asked basic OS ques: Virtual memory, Paging, etc.
- Then a DSA question:
- Given n, count the number of all possible BSTs.
3️⃣ LLD Round
- Got one DSA question here:
- Return greater of the two numbers without using “if”, “&&” and “||”.
- Then, design a Timer-management System.
- Gave my understanding of a timer.
- Coded public APIs - addTimer(), cancelTimer()…
